narrative:
Utica Village (precinct in Licking County) has 1,240 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
